LightningComponentBundle.description: Displays Sitetracker Map Layer records on a Project record page using Map Layer and Map Object Configuration settings, and supports creating Production Work Logs from Site and Segment map features.

property.name: mapHeightPx
property.label: Map Height (px)
property.description: Height of the map area in pixels.

property.name: workLogFieldSetApiName
property.label: Production Work Log Field Set API Name
property.description: Optional field set on sitetracker__Production_Work_Log__c used to control which fields appear in the Create Work Log modal. Example: sitetracker__Create_Work_Logs_Form_GIS

property.name: mapLayerRecordId1
property.label: Map Layer Record Id 1
property.description: Salesforce record Id for the first Sitetracker Map Layer to render.

property.name: relationshipFieldPathOverride1
property.label: Project Relationship Field Override 1
property.description: Optional field path on the layer's source object that links the record back to the current Project. Example: Project__c

property.name: filterFieldPathOverride1
property.label: Filter Field Override 1
property.description: Optional field path used for user filtering on the map for layer 1. Example: RUS_Code__c

property.name: mapLayerRecordId2
property.label: Map Layer Record Id 2
property.description: Salesforce record Id for the second Sitetracker Map Layer to render.

property.name: relationshipFieldPathOverride2
property.label: Project Relationship Field Override 2
property.description: Optional field path on the layer's source object that links the record back to the current Project. Example: Project__c

property.name: filterFieldPathOverride2
property.label: Filter Field Override 2
property.description: Optional field path used for user filtering on the map for layer 2. Example: RUS_Code__c

property.name: mapLayerRecordId3
property.label: Map Layer Record Id 3
property.description: Salesforce record Id for the third Sitetracker Map Layer to render.

property.name: relationshipFieldPathOverride3
property.label: Project Relationship Field Override 3
property.description: Optional field path on the layer's source object that links the record back to the current Project. Example: Project__c

property.name: filterFieldPathOverride3
property.label: Filter Field Override 3
property.description: Optional field path used for user filtering on the map for layer 3. Example: RUS_Code__c

property.name: mapLayerRecordId4
property.label: Map Layer Record Id 4
property.description: Salesforce record Id for the fourth Sitetracker Map Layer to render.

property.name: relationshipFieldPathOverride4
property.label: Project Relationship Field Override 4
property.description: Optional field path on the layer's source object that links the record back to the current Project. Example: Project__c

property.name: filterFieldPathOverride4
property.label: Filter Field Override 4
property.description: Optional field path used for user filtering on the map for layer 4. Example: RUS_Code__c

property.name: mapLayerRecordId5
property.label: Map Layer Record Id 5
property.description: Salesforce record Id for the fifth Sitetracker Map Layer to render.

property.name: relationshipFieldPathOverride5
property.label: Project Relationship Field Override 5
property.description: Optional field path on the layer's source object that links the record back to the current Project. Example: Project__c

property.name: filterFieldPathOverride5
property.label: Filter Field Override 5
property.description: Optional field path used for user filtering on the map for layer 5. Example: RUS_Code__c
